scripts.setup-and-run: npm run install:all && npm run migrate:backend && npm run test:backend && npm run dev:all
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.test:backend: npm --prefix backend run test:jest && npm --prefix backend run test:vitest
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.quick-start: npm run install:all && npm run migrate:backend && npm run dev:all
